basic_details.job_title: CSIR-CFTRI Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Central Food Technological Research Institute (CSIR-CFTRI) Project Associate - I Notification 2026 has been released on the official website www.cftri.res.in. A total of 3 Project Associate - I vacancies have been announced through the CSIR-CFTRI Project Associate - I Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 35 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST/PwBD/Women: 05 years, OBC: 03 years

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. in Zoology/Botany/Chemistry from recognised university or equivalent
qualification.details: M.Sc. in Zoology/Botany/Chemistry from a recognized university or equivalent.

salary_details.details: Rs. 31,000/- plus HRA or Rs. 25,000/- plus HRA per month.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 12-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CSIR-CFTRI to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: CSIR-CFTRI Project Associate - I Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the CSIR-CFTRI Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download CSIR-CFTRI Project Associate - I Job 2026 Notification PDF

CSIR-CFTRI Project Associate - I Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: M.Sc. in Zoology/Botany/Chemistry from a recognized university or equivalent.

content_sections.heading: CSIR-CFTRI Project Associate - I Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Maximum Age: 35 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST/PwBD/Women: 05 years, OBC: 03 years

content_sections.heading: CSIR-CFTRI Project Associate - I Salary 2026
content_sections.text: Rs. 31,000/- plus HRA or Rs. 25,000/- plus HRA per month.

content_sections.heading: CSIR-CFTRI Project Associate - I Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
CSIR-CFTRI Project Associate - I Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 12-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CSIR-CFTRI to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: CSIR-CFTRI Project Associate - I Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CSIR-CFTRI Project Associate – I Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Project Associate – I positions is 12th July 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Project Associate – I post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc. degree in Zoology, Botany, or Chemistry from a recognized university or an equivalent qualification to be eligible for this role.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Project Associate – I position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for the Project Associate – I post announced in the CSIR-CFTRI Recruitment 2026 notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Project Associate – I position is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for CSIR-CFTRI Project Associate – I Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, the official notification indicates that there is no application fee for General/OBC and SC/ST categories for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate – I role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Project Associate – I position will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 25,000/- to Rs. 31,000/- plus HRA.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Associate – I posts will involve shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. In which city and state is this recruitment taking place?
faq.answer: This recruitment drive is being conducted by CSIR-CFTRI in Mysuru, Karnataka.

faq.question: Q9. What is the nature of the job?
faq.answer: The Project Associate – I positions are contractual in nature, offering a fixed-term employment opportunity.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification and the online application link in the "Important Links" section of this article. Please visit the official website for more details.
